Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Goal Types & Lifecycle Catalog
Content:
Seven goal types registered in GoalFactory. Each has distinct IsComplete/HasFailed logic and is routed to a specific decomposer or the HtnPlanner fallback.

## Goal Interface (Agent.Core/Interfaces/IGoal.cs)

IGoal: Name, Description, Phases[], Id (Guid, default Guid.Empty, Sprint 38 P2), FailureReason (string?), DamageInterruptThresholdHp (int?, null=system default 6, 0=never interrupt), IsComplete(WorldState), HasFailed(WorldState).

IItemSpecGoal: extends IGoal with ItemSpec Spec and TargetCount (default 1).

## Goal Catalog

### 1. BuildGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/BuildGoal.cs
- Decomposer: BuildGoalDecomposer (via PlannerRouter)
- IsComplete: All blocks in blueprint have been placed (tracked via BuildProgressIndex fact in WorldState)
- HasFailed: Consecutive placement failures exceed threshold, or blueprint not found
- Parameters: Blueprint slug, origin (X,Y,Z), mode (creative/survival)
- DamageInterruptThresholdHp: null (uses system default 6)

### 2. GatherGoal (Generic)
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/GatherGoal.cs
- Decomposer: GatherGoalDecomposer (via PlannerRouter)
- IsComplete: Inventory item count >= TargetCount AND IsInventoryStale = false. Returns false when stale (prevents false completion after admin /clear)
- HasFailed: goal:Gather:<item>:failed fact is set, or consecutive failures exceed threshold
- Parameters: ItemSpec (item name + count)

### 3. GatherWoodGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/GatherWoodGoal.cs
- Decomposer: GatherGoalDecomposer
- IsComplete: Sum of *_log inventory >= count
- HasFailed: goal:GatherWood:failed fact is set
- Parameters: count (int)
- Notes: Legacy goal type, being superseded by generic GatherGoal

### 4. CraftItemGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/CraftItemGoal.cs
- Decomposer: CraftItemGoalDecomposer (via PlannerRouter)
- IsComplete: Inventory item count >= TargetCount AND IsInventoryStale = false
- HasFailed: goal:Craft:<item>:failed fact is set
- Parameters: ItemSpec (item + count)
- Handles: crafting table placement, recipe lookup, prerequisite gathering

### 5. SurviveNightGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/SurviveNightGoal.cs
- Decomposer: None (handled by HtnPlanner fallback)
- IsComplete: Always returns false (monster — must keep running)
- HasFailed: Returns false (never abandon surviving)
- Parameters: None
- Notes: Stub implementation — Phase 3 completeness goal, needs shelter-building logic

### 6. NavigateGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/NavigateGoal.cs
- Decomposer: None (handled by HtnPlanner)
- IsComplete: Bot position matches target coordinates (within tolerance)
- HasFailed: Pathfinder failure exceeds retries
- Parameters: TargetX, TargetY, TargetZ

### 7. SimpleGoal
- File: Agent.Planning/Goals/SimpleGoal.cs
- Decomposer: None (used for inline/legacy plans)
- IsComplete: Custom predicate or action sequence exhaustion
- HasFailed: Action failure count exceeds threshold
- Parameters: Action sequence, completion condition

## GoalFactory (Agent.Planning/GoalFactory.cs)

CreateAsync(goalName, parameters, ct) uses a Dictionary<string, Func<...>> registry to instantiate the right goal type. Returns null if goalName is not registered. Logs warning with available goal names.

## Damage Interrupt

DamageInterruptThresholdHp (default 6) can be overridden per goal. SurviveNightGoal could set higher (more cautious). BuildGoal might set lower (less interruption during construction). See agent-recovery-system.
